creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
So for some reason GNATS is not interpreting the attachments properly. If 
someone wants to handle this bug with another source than the E-Mail, please 
let me know and I'll provide the patch in some non-munged form for easy 
application.

In the mean time I have put up a copy here:

   http://distfiles.scode.org/mlref/duplicity-0.4.7.patch

-- 
/ Peter Schuller

PGP userID: 0xE9758B7D or 'Peter Schuller <peter.schuller@infidyne.com>'
Key retrieval: Send an E-Mail to getpgpkey@scode.org
E-Mail: peter.schuller@infidyne.com Web: http://www.scode.org
